mapper.select: SELECT vm.*, m.email AS member_email, m.name AS member_name, m.phone AS member_phone, v.name AS venue_name FROM venue_manager vm JOIN member m ON vm.member_id = m.member_id JOIN venue v ON vm.venue_id = v.venue_id WHERE vm.manager_id = #{managerId}

SELECT vm.*, m.email AS member_email, m.name AS member_name, m.phone AS member_phone, v.name AS venue_name FROM venue_manager vm JOIN member m ON vm.member_id = m.member_id JOIN venue v ON vm.venue_id = v.venue_id WHERE vm.member_id = #{memberId}

SELECT vm.*, m.email AS member_email, m.name AS member_name, m.phone AS member_phone, v.name AS venue_name FROM venue_manager vm JOIN member m ON vm.member_id = m.member_id JOIN venue v ON vm.venue_id = v.venue_id WHERE vm.approval_status = #{status} ORDER BY vm.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM venue_manager WHERE approval_status = #{status}

SELECT vm.*, m.email AS member_email, m.name AS member_name, m.phone AS member_phone, v.name AS venue_name FROM venue_manager vm JOIN member m ON vm.member_id = m.member_id JOIN venue v ON vm.venue_id = v.venue_id ORDER BY vm.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE venue_manager SET approval_status = #{approvalStatus}, approved_by = #{approvedBy}, approved_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE manager_id = #{managerId}
